description: Style Notecatwalk perfects the spring's aesthetic just right with this simplistically designed pair. This simple flats elevates your casual staples to give them a refined polish. Versatile enough to be worn with ethnic kurtis and denims and tees.Product DetailsSilver thong style straps with sequins all overRed, curved thick footbed with a heel patchCurved TPU outsole with patterned grooves all overMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
